mapper.select: SELECT /*페이인포 시퀀스 채번*/ TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_MSP_PAYINFO_01.NEXTVAL@DL_MSP, '000000000000000000000')) AS RECSEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT BAN ,CONTRACT_NUM, SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{ctn} AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C'
SELECT COUNT(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM CMN_KFTC_EVIDENCE@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
